case_title: KANG PROPERTY, INC. VS. VICTORINO FARFAN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF KANG PROPERTY, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KANG PROPERTY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FARFAN, VICTORINO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2831 CESAR CHAVEZ, S.F. CA. 94110, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FARFAN, VICTORINO
SUMMONS ISSUED (FIRST AMENDED) TO PLAINTIFF KANG PROPERTY, INC.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KANG PROPERTY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FARFAN, VICTORINO DOES 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KANG PROPERTY, INC. SERVED AUG-15-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FARFAN, VICTORINO
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT FARFAN, VICTORINO
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $110.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KANG PROPERTY, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT FARFAN, VICTORINO
